column5: Jin is a durable tank & Veigas does good AoE damage. Magic things go pew pew
column16: Your own units need to be FSI to work properly. Finishing assembly, world boss milestones, titanic growth, silver knights, etc. will get you there.

column5: [BLUE FLAME]: Rufus has synergy with Lass. When both are in Soul Imprint, everything dies.
column16: Mayden T can be used in any comp, granted you don't get bursted round start. Just use Stimulation once and auto invul after. Either that or revive.

Callisto T & Nelia T should in theory be unkillable in story if both are FSI. (Only applies when you're fighting Life enemies) Nelia T also reduces CDR, so you might be able to get away with auto'ing Invul with her as well, though she doesn't work as well as Mayden T universally.

column5: Tia offers more sustain, making her the safer pick than Elesis. Ley's summons aggro enemies, making living stages a bit easier.
column16: Ley really does suck as a solo dps but her summons can suck up damage, making some stages where you get bursted or whatever easier than using Lapis. There's only a few this applies to but it does work nonetheless.

column5: Lapis is a better DPS for stages where sustain isn't an issue or Ley is just slow.
column16: Elesis D5 is a tanky unit. Paired with your own Ai T; you can breeze through with Urara/Grandiel & Lapis on support party. Maybe you can try this on Life enemies, too?

column5: Elesis buffs better. Lapis will hit even harder. You just lose a bit of tanking. Just a bit.
column16: At some point, Support Units gain access to FSI. Cindy & Ganymede are easier to use at that point over Io + Serdin.

column5: Ronan isn't quite tanky but his Skill 2 provides invincibility. That's all her offers. It's also all you have until you unlock Callisto T
For when you don't need to tank as much, Scarde buffs Io. Io already just works, so more buffing is great.

column16: Bastet is Attribute neutral to everything. Just bring a healer who can support her in general content & try your best to live. She does enough DPS, though.

column5: For those who wanna ignore attributes & brute force the game?
column16: Hwarin T, & to some smaller extent Agensia, can kill everything story related, granted they stay alive. If you don't want to deal with attributes, you can try using them with more general units & cheat the game, though they fall off later in other content.
